---
title: "Project Status"
format: html
---

This page is no longer a semester-by-semester thesis timeline. The old phased
roadmap was pruned because it had drifted too far from the current code, paper,
and ideas surfaces.

## Current state

- The repo has a working single-step oracle labeling pipeline on ASE / EFM3D surfaces.
- The current learned scorer surface is VINv3, documented in [View Introspection Network (VIN) on EVL](impl/vin_nbv.qmd).
- The docs are being consolidated around current architecture pages, current model docs, and the living ideas scratchpad.

## Next decision gates

- Stay with the current dataset and ecosystem, or explicitly pivot the research scope.
- Keep investing in the current VINv3 scorer, or redirect effort toward multi-step RL and planning.
- Decide how to model or synthesize the missing counterfactual modalities required for non-myopic planning.
- Decide how to scale supervision beyond the GT-mesh subset without collapsing back to weak geometric proxies.

## Longer-horizon themes

- Multi-step, non-myopic RL
- Entity-aware NBV objectives
- Counterfactual view synthesis / richer intermediate state representations
- Human-in-the-loop guidance and deployment surfaces

For the detailed forward-looking scratchpad, use [Ideas and Future Directions](ideas.qmd).
